generated_oml:
instance LightingLuxSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for adaptive lighting systems used in post-occupancy data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingLuxDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensors for indoor environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensors for indoor environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorCO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 sensors for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorCO2DataTransmitted
]

instance LightingLuxDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLuxSensor
]

instance IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorTemperatureSensor
]

instance IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorHumiditySensor
]

instance IndoorCO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorCO2Sensor
]

instance LightingLuxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Lux data from lighting sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingLuxDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance IndoorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from indoor sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance IndoorHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity data from indoor sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance IndoorCO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CO2 data from indoor sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorCO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for adaptive lighting control in Building Control System"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for HVAC system adjustments"
]

instance WindowShadeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for window shade control"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthBalancingService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for device management and digital twin state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthBalancingService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService, SimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated transformation of BIM models into operational artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with Building Control System components, sensor and actuator metadata, and middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering, EclipseDitto
]

]

]

]

]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building in Living Lab case study, unified virtual representation for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization"
    base:contains LightingLuxSensor, IndoorTemperatureSensor, IndoorHumiditySensor, IndoorCO2Sensor, LightActuator, HVACController, WindowShadeActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin and fed back to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time operational adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital counterparts, with continuous data exchange for live operational updates and immediate response to physical system changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented framework integrating BIM as the semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, and Unreal Engine for visualization, with standardized extension points for scalable service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle, including design, construction, operations, refurbishments, and adaptations during operation, with BIM serving as a semantic backbone for lifecycle-encompassing optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability, architectural soundness, and alignment between digital and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware facilitate real-time data exchange between physical assets and the Digital Twin, enabling bidirectional communication without specific protocol details mentioned in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points and middleware (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) enable interoperability with external systems as part of the modular, service-oriented architecture."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and standardized extension points for modular service integration within the AECO domain, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]
